label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Karl - Claire with Patrick - Dave with Sam - Eve with Helga Then there are a series of partner switches. I need to track each switch step by step to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end. Let's go through each step one by one. First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Sam and Alice is with Lola. After switching, Dave will be with Lola and Alice will be with Sam. Let me note that down: After first switch: - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola Others remain the same: Bob with Karl, Claire with Patrick, Eve
